fieldUpdates.description: Field to Update if not rejected.
fieldUpdates.name: AgreementStatusNotRejected

fieldUpdates.description: Record Type Update to convert a a Request to an Approved Agreement
fieldUpdates.name: Agreement - Approved Rule - Record Type

fieldUpdates.description: Copy Name (Agreement Code) in Convention External ID

fieldUpdates.name: Agreement - Intermediary Approved

fieldUpdates.description: Set the Agreement Status to Expired
fieldUpdates.name: Agreement - Set Agreement Status Expired

fieldUpdates.description: change status of an agreement to Pending Termination when top management approves termination request.
fieldUpdates.name: Agreement Status Pending Termination

fieldUpdates.description: Set the Agreement Status to Terminated

fieldUpdates.description: Record Type Update to convert an Sub-distributor Request to an Approved Agreement

rules.description: Copy Agreement Code in TECH_ConventionExternalID if updated
Change status Rejected if approval submited.
Rule to fire 60 days before an Agreement Ends

criteriaItems.value: Compliance Approval,Global Head of Sales Approval

rules.description: Rule to fire when the Risk Assessment is changed on an Agreement
Rule to fire when the Approval status of an Agreement Changes

rules.fullName: Agreement Rule - End Date Greater Than Today
Agreement Rule - End Date Less Equal Today

rules.description: Rule to fire when the Agreement reaches the end date

rules.fullName: Agreement Rule - Grid Start Greater Than Today
Agreement Rule - Grid Start Less Equal Today

criteriaItems.value: Intermediary Agreement Request Full,Sub-distributor via Platforms Request Full

rules.description: Set the Agreement Set Approval Status to Compliance
Set the Agreement Approval Status to HoS
Fire 3 months after an Agreement rejected, changes automatically Status to ABORTED
Copy Business Region from company to related agreement
